creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Xin Wang from comment #0)
> Vim files for lang/swift are installed in /usr/local/share/vim/vim73/, which
> I think should be /usr/local/share/vim/vim80/.

It actually should be /usr/local/share/vim/vimfiles/ so that it is independent
of the Vim version.  But lang/swift is broken so there is no point in fixing
this at the moment.
